title: EQ - Select a value, close the EQ tab, restore defaults - it is returned to Bass
scenario: After selecting an EQ value, closing the EQ tab, and performing Restore Defaults, the EQ value is incorrectly reset to Bass instead of the actual default.
steps: Select an EQ value (Bass, Flat, Bright, or Custom EQ)
Navigate to Device Settings > Reset Device
expected: The EQ value should be restored to the actual default value.
